name: David Grisman
description: American mandolinist, composer, and record label owner
abstract: David Jay Grisman (born March 23, 1945) is an American mandolinist. His music combines bluegrass, folk, and jazz in a genre he calls "dawg music".

concerts.label: Absolut Grapelli: Back at Carnegie Hall

about_quotes.speaker: Denny Zeitlin
about_quotes.evidence: I also do duets with David Grisman, the mandolin player. We did an album for his label, Acoustic Disk, that came out about a year ago.
about_quotes.doc_title: Denny Zeitlin interviewed by Monk Rowe, San Francisco, California, August 8, 2002

about_quotes.speaker: Joe Ascione
about_quotes.evidence: David Grisman on mandolin, they played the melody... I played bongo, shakers and a couple other things.
about_quotes.doc_title: Joe Ascione interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clearwater Beach, Florida, March 17, 2001
